title: Relics
description: Large project aimed at recycling all the enchanted books in the game and replacing them with unique Relics.
body:
We present to your attention a large project aimed at recycling all the enchanted books in the game. At the moment, the project is **completed by 70% and is a test**, but the release of additions to it is planned quite often. Therefore, as an author, I really need your comments, perhaps you have ideas for finalizing this project, or ideas for relics, so write - everything will be read and taken into account.

_What is available at the moment:_
1. All textures of enchanted books related to tools, fishing rod, bow, crossbow, sword and trident have been replaced with themed relics, for example, a book enchanted for Mending has been replaced with a Magnet
2. The name **"Book of Enchantments"** has been changed to **"Relic"**
3. Names of enchantments have been replaced with names of relics, for example, "Luck" has been replaced with "Clover"
4. A description of what she does has been added to all the relics, for example, the "Skull" relic has this description: "Steals an item in case of death"
5. The designations of the relic level have received a color explanation: The first level has no color or text designation, the second has the designation II, and is also highlighted in green, the third has the designation III, and is also highlighted in purple, the fourth has the designation IV, and is also highlighted in red, well, the fifth has the designation V, and It is also highlighted in gold.
6. Curses are now highlighted in **bright red**
